title: Decadent Saudi Arabian Spaghetti Wrap
description: A rich and gooey Saudi Arabian dish featuring spaghetti, ssam-wrap, and dairy-free friendly ingredients, perfect for curing hangovers.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked spaghetti, mushroom mixture, and vegan mozzarella shreds.
Stir in the sauce until the spaghetti is well coated.
Warm the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by filling each one with the spaghetti mixture and serving immediately.
